name: The Empire of Rome (RPG)
description:
All eyes are on you, great leader of the Roman Empire. Will you be like the cruel and crazy Caligula and Nero? Or will you be wise and ambitious, like Augustus and Julius? Only time will tell..


{} Welcome to the first open-ended Roman Empire bot! {}

(Now with a Peasant start!)

For Updates, see below!

⇓⇓⇓⇓⇓⇓⇓⇓⇓⇓⇓⇓⇓⇓

[Update 1: Random events should pop up for you to handle.] [Update 2: Started a notable characters list, starting with Cleopatra.] [Update 3: Rare sightings of mythological beings added. Pantheons can now answer your prayers. |Note: it's your choice to keep it realistic or not.|] [Update 3.5: Made people of various cultures have their names be of their culture.]
[Update 4: Added directions to the definitions that should (hopefully) cut down the A.I. using your character with your consent, and removed any historical context aside from the death of Julius Caesar. |Note: There's nothing I can do to fully prevent the A.I. from taking actions and speaking for your character. This is a limit of JanitorAI that is out of my hands. You can train the A.I. by manually removing any generations the A.I. makes, but it can't be fully prevented.|]
[|Note: There's nothing I can do to fully prevent the A.I. from taking actions and speaking for your character. This is a limit of JanitorAI that is out of my hands. You can train the A.I. by manually removing any generations the A.I. makes, but it can't be fully prevented.|]
[Fixed the grammar of the initial message. God, it was terrible..]
creator: Derpyman
